contents.description:
The pack provides 4 skills for Red Hat container security validation,
supported by 9 helper scripts for deterministic data fetching.

skills.name: container-cve-validator
skills.summary_markdown:
Full CVE validation pipeline for Red Hat container images. Extracts official
SBOM attestations, checks Red Hat VEX data, performs version comparison,
scans for newer patched images, and detects VEX data gaps. Supports CVE IDs
and RHSA advisory IDs as input, with batch scanning via CSV files.

skills.name: coreos-cve-validator
skills.summary_markdown:
CVE validation for Red Hat Enterprise Linux CoreOS (RHCOS) in specific OCP
releases. Extracts RPM packages from CoreOS images, classifies by source
(RHEL/OCP/Fast Datapath), validates against VEX data with RHEL EUS stream
awareness, and detects RHCOS VEX discrepancies.

skills.name: cve-recon
skills.summary_markdown:
Queries MITRE CVE API, OSV.dev, and Go vulnerability database to produce
a structured report of affected packages, ecosystems, and vulnerable
version ranges for a given CVE ID.

skills.name: image-inspect
skills.summary_markdown:
Fetches container image labels, validates registry ownership, resolves
tag/digest via SBOM, and reports the SBOM artifact OCI reference.

skills_decision_guide.reason: Full validation pipeline using SBOM attestations, Red Hat VEX data, and newer image scanning.
skills_decision_guide.user_request: "Validate this CVE against my container image" or "Is CVE-X a false positive?"

skills_decision_guide.reason: Extracts CoreOS RPM list, validates against VEX with RHEL EUS stream awareness.
skills_decision_guide.user_request: "Check if this CVE affects CoreOS in OCP 4.20" or "Validate RHSA against RHCOS"

skills_decision_guide.reason: Quick CVE metadata lookup from MITRE, OSV.dev, and Go vulnerability database.
skills_decision_guide.user_request: "What packages does CVE-X affect?" or "Look up CVE details"

skills_decision_guide.reason: Fetches image labels, registry ownership, and SBOM artifact reference.
skills_decision_guide.user_request: "Inspect this container image" or "What SBOM does this image have?"

description: Advanced CVE validation for Red Hat container images and OpenShift CoreOS using official SBOMs and VEX data.
mcp_section:
This pack does not use MCP servers. All data fetching is performed via
local Python helper scripts that call public APIs directly.
name: Red Hat Security Validation

resources.description: Official Red Hat VEX/CSAF data, security advisories, and CVE information.
resources.title: Red Hat Security Data

resources.description: Authoritative CVE metadata source used for vulnerability reconnaissance.
resources.title: MITRE CVE API

resources.description: Open Source Vulnerability database with cross-references to Go, PyPI, npm ecosystems.
resources.title: OSV.dev

resources.description: Tool for downloading SBOM attestations from container images.
resources.title: Sigstore cosign

resources.description: Registry client tool for remote image metadata inspection.
resources.title: regclient

resources.description: Package manager used to install agentic collections.
resources.title: Lola Package Manager

sample_workflows.name: Container CVE validation
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "Is CVE-2024-45490 a real issue in registry.redhat.io/ubi9/ubi:latest?"
- container-cve-validator extracts SBOM, checks VEX, confirms true/false positive with remediation

sample_workflows.name: Scanner RHSA verification
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "My scanner flagged RHSA-2026:3337 on our UBI9 image. Is this relevant?"
- container-cve-validator resolves RHSA to CVEs, validates each against the image, reports which apply

sample_workflows.name: CoreOS vulnerability check
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "Does CVE-2025-61726 affect CoreOS in OCP 4.20.16?"
- coreos-cve-validator extracts RPMs, finds podman, checks VEX under OCP and RHEL EUS CPEs

sample_workflows.name: Quick CVE research
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "What packages does CVE-2024-45490 affect?"
- cve-recon queries MITRE, OSV.dev, returns affected packages with version ranges

summary:
Validates CVEs against Red Hat container images and CoreOS nodes using official
SBOM attestations, Red Hat VEX/CSAF data, and CVE metadata from MITRE/OSV.dev.
Eliminates false positives from security scanners and provides clear remediation
guidance including layered product relationships and newer image availability.
